---
title: "Akpeiil Shaker"
links:
  - label: GV300 Showcase
    url: "gv300.html"
site: distill::distill_website
output:
  postcards::jolla
---
<div style="text-align: center;">
  <img src="yourphoto.jpg" width="200" style="border-radius: 50%;">
</div>

Hello! My name is Akpeiil and I am a final-year student at the University of Essex studying Politics and Economics. This website showcases my work from the GV300 course, where I explore political phenomena through quantitative analysis. Across these projects, I work with real-world data, apply statistical methods, and present findings in a clear and accessible way.
The portfolio reflects not only the outcomes of my work, but also my progression in developing analytical skills and confidence in using quantitative tools to understand political behaviour.

You can view my projects here:

[**GV300 Showcase**](GV300Showcase.html)
